offerings.title: Agent Payment Boundary Review
offerings.summary: Review public agent payment metadata for ambiguity in payer authority, recipient wallet control, supported assets and networks, and donation-versus-service boundaries.
offerings.deliverable: One-page findings matrix with cited fields, contradictions, missing safety statements, and prioritized corrections.
offerings.turnaroundLabel: Target within 1 business day after verified payment and complete public inputs.
requiredInputs: one public HTTPS input: an agent, payment, or support manifest; a static JSON, Markdown, or text document; or an unauthenticated x402 resource URL whose current HTTP 402 response supplies PaymentRequired
reachable email address only when using email transport
optionalInputs: one additional public manifest, static document, or unauthenticated x402 resource URL
target agent framework or payment protocol
one specific authority or payment-boundary question
offerings.scopeLabel: Up to two public HTTPS inputs totaling at most 100 KB: static JSON, Markdown, or text documents, or unauthenticated x402 resource URLs whose current HTTP 402 response supplies PaymentRequired; no private repositories, credentialed endpoints, PaymentPayload, signature headers, keys, wallet connections, code execution, or security certification.

offerings.title: Claimant Context Intake
offerings.summary: Record the claimant's stated role, a reachable contact path, and public transaction context. This does not verify identity or wallet ownership.
offerings.deliverable: Claimant context checklist, case reference, explicit unknowns, and a recommended next step.
offerings.turnaroundLabel: Target within 1 business day after verified payment and complete public inputs.
requiredInputs: reachable email address only when using email transport
optionalInputs: claimant's stated role or relationship to the transaction
offerings.scopeLabel: One Ethereum Mainnet transaction hash and one claimant context.

offerings.title: Evidence Preview
offerings.summary: Summarize the public facts for one Ethereum Mainnet transaction.
offerings.deliverable: One-page transaction summary, recipient end-of-block balance and bytecode observation pinned to a cited block hash and number with UTC timestamp, public source links, explicit unknowns, and a recommended next step including stop when appropriate.
offerings.turnaroundLabel: Target within 2 business days after verified payment and complete public inputs.
requiredInputs: reachable email address only when using email transport
optionalInputs: claimant's stated role or relationship to the transaction
offerings.scopeLabel: One transaction hash; no identity attribution, legal opinion, tax advice, or recovery execution.

offerings.title: Trace Snapshot
offerings.summary: Capture the flagged transfer, one direct hop, and up to 25 outbound transfers from its recipient.
offerings.deliverable: Transaction path table, balances observed at a cited block number and UTC timestamp, public source links, and explicit unknowns.
offerings.turnaroundLabel: Target within 3 business days after verified payment and complete public inputs.
requiredInputs: reachable email address only when using email transport
optionalInputs: claimant's stated role or relationship to the transaction
offerings.scopeLabel: One Ethereum Mainnet transaction hash, one direct hop, and a written observation cutoff.

offerings.title: 48-Hour Agent Payment Failure Reproduction Sprint
offerings.summary: Exercise one public agent-payment flow against deterministic replay, restart, expiry, recipient, amount, network, authorization, and receipt-identity failure cases.
offerings.deliverable: Eight deterministic negative-path cases, one runnable Node regression harness, machine-readable findings.json, and prioritized remediation notes.
acceptanceCriteria: npm ci && npm test runs the delivered public fixture bundle without buyer credentials
all eight negative-path cases have an explicit PASS, FAIL, or NOT-TESTABLE result
every FAIL is reproducible and pinned to the tested source revision
every delivered artifact is included in the SHA-256 hash manifest
offerings.acceptanceBoundary: These are objective technical completion checks. Buyer-specific legal acceptance, cancellation, refund, tax, invoice, and governing terms are defined only in the separately human-approved SOW.
offerings.turnaroundLabel: Target within 48 hours after the separately human-approved SOW's kickoff condition is satisfied and complete public inputs are available.
requiredInputs: one or two public HTTPS URLs identifying the repository, sandbox, protocol specification, or sanitized agent-payment artifacts to test
reachable email address only when using email transport
optionalInputs: one specific payment invariant or failure mode to prioritize
one public command or fixture that reproduces the current flow
offerings.scopeLabel: One public or sanitized agent-payment flow, eight fixed negative-path cases, and one Node regression harness; no certification, no penetration test, no production exploitation, no private repositories, no credentials, no wallet connection, no signing, and no settlement action.
offerings.requestOnlyDisclosure: Request only. The engagement and delivery are asynchronous; no meeting or call is required. ACH, Wise, or Zelle invoice terms, including the optional $750 kickoff structure, are available only when stated in a separately human-approved SOW containing complete commercial terms. Zelle is available only after a signed SOW and invoice and the buyer's acknowledgement that Zelle has no purchase protection. This catalog publishes no payment instructions or banking details for the sprint.

requestProcess: A human or payer agent operating within its own delegated policy sends an email or a public GitHub issue with the selected offering's required public inputs and any optional context.

Sentinel confirms scope and timing in writing. Catalog-quote services also receive an exact payment reference and payment instructions; request-only offerings require a separately human-approved SOW and receive no payment instructions from this catalog.
The requester decides whether to proceed only after verifying the complete written quote or separately human-approved SOW and all applicable payment terms.
Sentinel prepares only the confirmed evidence deliverable.
